context7_research: PSR-14 Event Dispatcher, Provider, and Listener.
architectural_design: Interface: Psr\EventDispatcher\EventDispatcherInterface. Features: Synchronous/Asynchronous event handling via Swoole coroutines, Listener prioritization.
integration_strategy: Injected into all services for decoupled communication.
ci_verification: Verify listener execution order; Async event latency < 2ms.
